final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining 大话西游 in a 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90年代港片 cinematic aesthetic with film grain — exact grain level and stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a foreground embracing couple against a city wall, with two figures standing in the distant background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 kissing/embracing against a 城墙, with 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic 城墙 backdrop evoking the world of 大话西游
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, emotionally charged atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 90s Hong Kong film stock — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a film-grain, aged-celluloid surface treatment — exact grain weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid: must avoid modern CGI-clean aesthetics, must avoid contemporary poster design conventions
